name: @fintech-portfolio/design-tokens
description: Shared Tailwind CSS v4 design tokens/theme (Clearline palette), distributed via CSS-first @theme configuration, plus a React ThemeProvider/useTheme hook for light/dark toggling.

metadata.scope: Shared theme/tokens layer (Tailwind v4 @theme CSS + typed token exports + ThemeProvider/useTheme). Populated with the Clearline-branded --cl-* palette now that a fully-specified design system exists as a finished artifact — see EPIC-CW-000 for the rationale amending TDR-PLATFORM-001's original 'defer until a second app exists' scope.
metadata.regenerate: Edit tokens.source.json (a copy of clearline-tokens.json), then run `pnpm --filter @fintech-portfolio/design-tokens generate` to rebuild src/theme.css and src/tokens.ts.
